data.title: Denim Jeans
data.description: Premium Denim Jeans, designed for style and long-lasting durability. Made from 100% genuine indigo-dyed cotton denim with a classic mid-rise waist and comfortable fit.

data.title: Puma Jeans
data.description: Sporty and athletic-inspired denim jeans from Puma. Crafted with high-stretch elastane blends for maximum mobility and a modern slim-fit aesthetic.

data.title: Deshi Genji
data.description: A classic local t-shirt (Genji) made from breathable 180GSM combed cotton. Perfect for the tropical hot weather, ensuring cool comfort all day long.

data.title: B-Deshi Genji
data.description: Vibrant and colourful edition of the local Deshi Genji, styled with chest graphic prints. Premium soft-wash finish for superior feel.

data.title: Pakistani Sharee
data.description: Exquisite premium silk sharee with intricate hand-embroidered borders and traditional zari artwork. An elegant attire for weddings and grand festive celebrations.

data.title: American Lungi
data.description: A modern twist to the traditional men's wrap. Featuring premium lightweight cotton flannel material in checkered patterns. Relaxed fit for casual lounge comfort.
